name: Turnover Cost Calculator
description: Calculates total cost of employee turnover based on direct and indirect costs, using industrial engineering standards (ISO 30400, Lean, Six Sigma, WERC).

inputs.label: Number of Employees
inputs.businessContext: Total headcount at the start of the period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total headcount at the start of the period.

inputs.label: Annual Turnover Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of employees leaving per year (voluntary + involuntary).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of employees leaving per year (voluntary + involuntary).

inputs.label: Average Annual Salary per Employee
inputs.businessContext: Average total compensation (base + benefits) per employee.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average total compensation (base + benefits) per employee.

inputs.label: Onboarding Cost per Hire
inputs.businessContext: Training materials, orientation, IT setup, mentor time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Training materials, orientation, IT setup, mentor time.

inputs.label: Lost Productivity Duration
inputs.businessContext: Average months of reduced output per new hire (ramp-up period).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average months of reduced output per new hire (ramp-up period).

inputs.label: Productivity Factor during Ramp-up
inputs.businessContext: Average productivity level during ramp-up (e.g., 50% means half output).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average productivity level during ramp-up (e.g., 50% means half output).

inputs.label: Overtime Cover Cost per Leaver
inputs.businessContext: Extra pay for remaining staff covering duties.

businessContext_i18n.en: Extra pay for remaining staff covering duties.

inputs.label: Quality Defect Cost per Leaver
inputs.businessContext: Rework, scrap, customer complaints due to inexperience.

businessContext_i18n.en: Rework, scrap, customer complaints due to inexperience.

inputs.label: Knowledge Loss Cost per Leaver
inputs.businessContext: Loss of institutional knowledge, intellectual property.

businessContext_i18n.en: Loss of institutional knowledge, intellectual property.

inputs.label: Include Indirect Costs
inputs.businessContext: Toggle to include quality, customer, and knowledge loss costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Toggle to include quality, customer, and knowledge loss costs.

rules.message: Annual turnover rate must be between 0% and 100%.
Average salary must be greater than zero.
Productivity factor must be between 0% and 100%.
Lost productivity duration must be between 0 and 12 months.

rules.condition: include_indirect_costs == true OR (quality_defect_cost_per_leaver == 0 AND customer_impact_cost_per_leaver == 0 AND knowledge_loss_cost_per_leaver == 0)
rules.message: If indirect costs are excluded, set quality, customer, and knowledge loss costs to zero.

thresholds.message: Turnover rate exceeds 20% – consider retention initiatives.
Total turnover cost exceeds 20% of total payroll – urgent action recommended.
Productivity loss accounts for more than 30% of total turnover cost – review onboarding and ramp-up processes.
